original_statement: which player has the most titles?
mutated_statement: which person has the most things?
mutation_analysis: Entity generalization + Noun generalization: role-specific noun replaced by generic human | specific achievement noun replaced by vague hypernym (player → person | titles → things)

behavior_analysis.behavior_category: 意识到目标模糊，猜测目标
behavior_analysis.behavior_reason: 依据识别要点：agent 在多处明确表明歧义，例如在 tree_and_critic/after_refine 中写道 “The term ‘things’ is ambiguous” 并在 critique 中指出“选择‘final appearances’是没有根据的假设”。具体表现：尽管意识到“things”含糊，agent 仍然基于不同假设给出具体答案（迭代0/1/2 的 simple_query 分别返回“jansher khan|jahangir khan”、“jansher khan|jahangir khan|chris dittmar”等），并在后续说明中列举了三种可能的度量（titles、runner-up、final appearances）并据此推断输出。归类理由：符合“意识到目标模糊，猜测目标”定义——明确承认歧义但不向用户反问或请求澄清，而是根据自身假设做出具体回答。
